name: TC-INGEST-001 — Valid PesaFlow webhook with correct HMAC and fresh timestamp
description: Verifies that a valid PesaFlow webhook carrying a correct HMAC-SHA256 signature and a fresh ISO-8601 timestamp is accepted (HTTP 202) and that all downstream effects — Kafka message, ledger row, GridFS document, distributed trace, and Prometheus metric — are recorded correctly.
descriptionHtml: Verifies that a valid PesaFlow webhook carrying a correct HMAC-SHA256 signature and a fresh ISO-8601 timestamp is accepted (HTTP 202) and that all downstream effects — Kafka message, ledger row, GridFS document, distributed trace, and Prometheus metric — are recorded correctly.

steps.name: Step 1: Generate payload from PesaFlow happy-path template
Step 2: Compute X-PSP-Signature = HMAC-SHA256(body || timestamp, PSK) and hex-encode
Step 4 (pre): Read baseline rms_ingestion_requests_total counter
